query: SELECT npc.id, npc.npc_id, npc.name, npc.title, npc.region, npc.location, npc.map_node_id, npc.wuxing, npc.npc_type, n.name as node_name FROM game_npc_catalog npc LEFT JOIN game_map_nodes n ON npc.map_node_id = n.id ORDER BY npc.map_node_id LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT npc.id, npc.npc_id, npc.name, npc.title, npc.region, npc.location, npc.map_node_id, npc.wuxing, npc.npc_type, n.name as node_name FROM game_npc_catalog npc LEFT JOIN game_map_nodes n ON npc.map_node_id = n.id ORDER BY npc.map_node_id LIMIT 20
